transcript.aiResponse: Happy to help with that! To make sure I update the right tasks — do you remember which project the "Malte" actions are under, or should I search your Notion workspace directly?

cases.expectation: The user is referring to actions on their plate today (the /today list, which is cross-workspace). The assistant MUST call get-todays-actions to list Today's actions, find the ones matching "Malte", and complete them via update-action by id. It must NOT deflect: no "which project?" question, no "should I search your Notion workspace?", and it must never ask the user which workspace or project the tasks live in — get-todays-actions returns ids across all workspaces, so the assistant can resolve them itself.
